Responsible AI
NExT 2026 Workshop, Singapore
Wed Apr 29 - Thu Apr 30, 2026

We are pleased to announce the NExT Singapore Workshop 2026, which will take place from April 29 to 30, 2026. The theme of this year’s workshop is “Responsible AI”, featuring a series of focused activities:

    • 29 Apr: NExT Workshop focusing on "Responsible AI".
    • 30 Apr: Discussion on AI trends and future planning for NExT Workshops.

This workshop is designed to bring together NExT members and collaborators to explore the advancements, applications, and future pathways of Responsible AI. Participation is by invitation only, with registration limited to invitees.

More details will be shared soon—stay tuned! We look forward to seeing you in Singapore.

Registration

Registration (Google Form)

Hotel

The recommended hotel is Park Avenue Rochester (31 Rochester Dr, Singapore 138637) . You can download the booking form, complete it, and send it to the reservation department. Contact details are provided in the form.

Program

TBD. More details will be shared soon—stay tuned!

Organizers

Sponsors

Location

The workshop will be held at Innovation 4.0, NUS (3 Research Link, Singapore 117602).
